outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says there is 'no time frame' on Iran war, denies midterms driving decisions — Navy Secretary fired
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Trump's 'no time frame' statement, Navy Secretary Phelan firing during active blockade, and IRGC power consolidation exposé. Also covers journalist Amal Khalil killing in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil killed in Israeli airstrike — IRGC power grab as ceasefire frays
outlets.summary: WaPo leads with killing of Al Akhbar journalist in Israeli airstrike on al-Tiri. Also covers Israel striking five Beirut neighborhoods without warning and Pentagon budget request.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump orders ceasefire extended — Iran seizes two container ships in Hormuz during truce
outlets.summary: Right-leaning coverage emphasizes Trump's narrative of Iran's financial collapse and military/police pay complaints. Focus on blockade pressure.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Iran War pushes gas past $4 — US still paying far less than most countries
outlets.summary: Coverage framing US gas prices as painful but noting Americans pay less than European allies hit harder by the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled — IRGC tightens grip
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Day 54 developments: IRGC fires on 3 ships in Hormuz, seizes 2. Iran boycotts talks. EU agrees Hormuz sanctions. Comprehensive liveblog with multiple correspondents.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension made at the request of Pakistan's PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran dismisses Trump's claim that it scrapped executions at his request — IAF spy case revealed
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog covers IDF Chief Zamir's high alert declaration, IRGC ship attacks/seizures in Hormuz, Hezbollah rocket/drone Day 2, Trump's Iran financial collapse claims.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended until Iranian officials submit 'unified proposal'
outlets.summary: JPost covers Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension and its implications for Israeli military planning.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran FM: Hormuz situation stems directly from US lawlessness — Hegseth fires Navy Secretary
outlets.summary: Press TV/IRGC narrative frames ship seizures as lawful enforcement against vessels 'manipulating navigation systems.' Araghchi: Iran 'knows how to resist bullying.' Blockade called 'act of war.'

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran rejects pressure as US maritime terrorism casts ominous cloud over diplomacy
outlets.summary: Coverage of Tifani seizure as 'maritime terrorism' and Araghchi's condemnation of US blockade as 'act of war' and ceasefire violation.
